name: Peppy Pizza Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Ripe Olives, Pitted and Sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 1 8-oz can of Mushroom Stems and Pieces that has been drained.
2. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
3. Mix the meats, bread crumbs, egg, oregano leaves, salt, and half of the tomato sauce in a bowl.
4. Press the mixture evenly against the bottom and sides of an ungreased 10-inch pie pan.
5. Sprinkle the mushrooms and olives over the meat layer in the pan.
6. Pour the remaining tomato sauce over the vegetables.
7. Bake uncovered for 25 minutes. The pepperoni will give a red-flecked appearance to the meat.
8. Sprinkle shredded cheese over the pizza and bake an additional 5 minutes.
9. Let cool for 5 minutes, then cut into 6 wedges.
Note: If a 10-inch pie pan is not available, use a 9-inch one but place a pan under it to catch any juice runoff. You can also substitute mushrooms with 8 oz of green beans or corn if desired.
